title: Amendment in the Notification regarding Guidelines for Certification of Films for Public Exhibition published vide S.O. 836(E) dated 06.12.1991
description: Amendment in the Notification regarding Guidelines for Certification of Films for Public Exhibition published vide S.O. 836(E) dated 06.12.1991
text: REGD. NO. D.L.-33004/97 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 526 ] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, SEPTEMBER 15, 1997/BHADRA 24, 1919 MINISTRY OF INFORMATION AND BROADCASTING NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 15th September, 1997 S.O. 655(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of section 5B of the Cinematograph Act, 1952 (37 of 1952), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Information and Broadcasting in No. S.O. 836 (E) dated the 6th December 1991, namely:— In the said notification, in paragraph 2, after item (vi) and the entry relating thereto, the following item and entry relating thereto shall be inserted, namely;— "(vi-a) scenes tending to encourage, justify or glamorise consumption of tobacco or smoking are not shown." [No. 8O8/4/96-F(C)] RAGHU MENON, Jt. Secy. FOOTNOTE :— The principal notification was published, vide S.O. No. 836 (E) dated the 6th December, 1991 in the Gazette of India: Extraordinary Part II, Section 3, Sub-Section (ii). 2298 GI/97 Printed by the Manager, Govt. of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054— 1997 -- 1 of 2 -- -- 2 of 2 --
